      Disney Store Official Jessie Interactive Talking Action Figure, Pixar's Toy Story, 36cm/14”, Pull string Cowgirl Doll Featuring 15+ English Phrases, Interacts with Other Characters, Ages 3+

      Visit the Disney Store Store
      4.5 4.5 out of 5 stars (2,468)

      Sign in to continue
      • Watch as your toys come to life, with this official Disney Store Toy Story talking action figure! Hear your favourite phrases and recreate movie scenes for endless hours of fun!
      • Jessie is the energetic cowgirl that has plenty to say! Pull the string on Jessie's back to hear her talk and yodel - she says 14 different phrases. Please note, phrases are in English
      • Unlock character specific phrases when Jessie is near different Toy Story characters from this range. Jessie's presence will prompt the other character to talk to her! (Make sure to switch from "Try Me" to "On" to unlock the interactive feature)
      • Says iconic phrases such as "Well Howdy, Glad to meet you!", "That critter needs help!" and "Yes Sir! We gonna be friends forever!"
      • This Jessie interactive talking action figure is approximately 36cm tall. She has a soft body and solid hat, boots and facial features. It includes x3 LR44 button cell batteries.
      • Coming from the Disney Store, you can be confident that this product has been made with the utmost care and quality. It's a perfect birthday gift, Christmas present or toy for everyday play - sure to put a smile on any Toy Story fan's face!

      Product Description

      Make playtime more magical with our official toys collection. Let your imagination soar with our talking action figures, dolls, play sets and more, featuring your favourite Disney Princesses, Pixar protagonists, Marvel Superheroes and many more!

      How customer reviews and ratings work

      Customer Reviews, including Product Star Ratings, help customers to learn more about the product and decide whether it is the right product for them.

      To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyses reviews to verify trustworthiness.

      Top reviews from United Kingdom

      • Mrs E Kyle
        5.0 out of 5 stars Buzzing for a new Buzz!
        Reviewed in the United Kingdom on 7 April 2026
        Style Name: Buzz LightyearVerified Purchase
        Great Character toy from Toy Story. My son wanted the Interactive Buzz lightyear so he can talk to the other Toy Story Toys like Woody , Alien, Jesse and Zurg. Makes a great gift for Buzz light year fans. Quite a big toy so suitable for older toddlers. Real Buzz Year voice and sounds from the movies.
        Read more
        Helpful
         Report
      • adam john ellis
        5.0 out of 5 stars "Okay, Mr. Light Beer, prove it".
        Reviewed in the United Kingdom on 3 February 2026
        Style Name: Buzz LightyearVerified Purchase
        Almost gave this 4 stars as I'm unsure it's worth the price. But pleased with the features. And my daughter loves it. Wings pop out and light up. The helmet has a button on the side for it to open and close. The communicator opens. It has plenty of sounds, but the laser sounds completely different to what it should be. Paint and details are great but the face let's it down and makes it look cheap. Good range of movement and articulation, and light enough for a 3 year old to play with without knocking themselves out.
        Read more
        adam john ellis

        Almost gave this 4 stars as I'm unsure it's worth the price. But pleased with the features. And my daughter loves it. Wings pop out and light up. The helmet has a button on the side for it to open and close. The communicator opens. It has plenty of sounds, but the laser sounds completely different to what it should be. Paint and details are great but the face let's it down and makes it look cheap.       • kathleen
        4.0 out of 5 stars Great toy, not too sure of the value for money
        Reviewed in the United Kingdom on 22 January 2026
        Style Name: Buzz LightyearVerified Purchase
        We bought the Buzz lightyear.
        Pros: Brilliant toy, very sturdy great for little hands, all sound effects worked perfectly and my little boy had hours of fun with Buzz. Comes with spaceship box which only adds to the imaginative play.
        Cons: the button to release the helmet visor broke within minutes. So now the visor stays open all the time. My boy was a bit annoyed by this but quickly got over it when he realised that it doesn’t really affect play too much. Just a shame for something on an almost £40 to break so quickly.
        Read more

      Top reviews from other countries

      Translate all reviews to English
      • Tobias
        5.0 out of 5 stars Superbe réplique, très fidèle
        Reviewed in France on 18 December 2025
        Style Name: WoodyVerified Purchase
        Cette figurine de Woody est une excellente surprise pour la qualité globale, malgré un petit bémol sonore.

        Ce que j'ai aimé :
        Fidélité visuelle : La figurine est grande, bien finie et ressemble trait pour trait au héros du film.
        Le détail culte : Le prénom « Andy » est bien inscrit sous la botte, un must pour les fans !

        Le packaging : La boîte style "Western" est magnifique, identique à celle du film. Parfait pour un cadeau ou une exposition.

        À savoir avant achat :
        Audio : Woody parle uniquement en anglais et le volume sonore est assez faible.

        Bilan :
        Un superbe objet pour les nostalgiques et les fans de Toy Story. Si la langue anglaise ne vous dérange pas, le rapport qualité/prix est imbattable.
        Read more
        Report
        Translate review to English

      Product Summary: Disney Store Official Jessie Interactive Talking Action Figure, Pixar's Toy Story, 36cm/14”, Pull string Cowgirl Doll Featuring 15+ English Phrases, Interacts with Other Characters, Ages 3+

      From Disney Store

      4.5 out of 5 stars, 2,468 ratings

      Customer reviews

      100+ bought in past week

      Price

      No featured offers available

      Other sellers

      Other sellers

      About this Item

      • Watch as your toys come to life, with this official Disney Store Toy Story talking action figure! Hear your favourite phrases and recreate movie scenes for endless hours of fun!
      • Jessie is the energetic cowgirl that has plenty to say! Pull the string on Jessie's back to hear her talk and yodel - she says 14 different phrases. Please note, phrases are in English
      • Unlock character specific phrases when Jessie is near different Toy Story characters from this range. Jessie's presence will prompt the other character to talk to her! (Make sure to switch from "Try Me" to "On" to unlock the interactive feature)
      • Says iconic phrases such as "Well Howdy, Glad to meet you!", "That critter needs help!" and "Yes Sir! We gonna be friends forever!"
      • This Jessie interactive talking action figure is approximately 36cm tall. She has a soft body and solid hat, boots and facial features. It includes x3 LR44 button cell batteries.
      • Coming from the Disney Store, you can be confident that this product has been made with the utmost care and quality. It's a perfect birthday gift, Christmas present or toy for everyday play - sure to put a smile on any Toy Story fan's face!

      Product description

      Product description
      ''Yodelay-hee-hoo!'' Rustle up some fun with Jessie, our interactive talking action figure. The yodelling cowgirl has plenty to say especially when she detects other Toy Story interactive figures nearby.
      • Inspired by Disney and Pixar's Toy Story movies
      • Pull string to hear 14 phrases including ''Come on partner, let square dance!'' and ''Yes Sir! We gonna be friends forever!''
      • Includes interactive feature so when Jessie detects other Toy Story interactive action figures nearby it triggers phrases
      • Includes Try me/On/Off switch
      • Soft body construction, solid head, and boots
      • Braided yarn hair with satin ribbon
      • Includes detachable cowboy hat
      • Please note: Other Toy Story Interactive Action Figures sold separately, subject to availability
      • Must switch from ‘Try me’ mode to ‘On' mode to enable interactive chatting feature
      • Created for Disney Store
      Directions
      Switch the toy from 'Try me' mode to 'On' mode to enable interactive chatting feature.
